meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Advanced Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: Antigravity Template for SaaS Development
content.seo_description: Master SaaS development as a freelancer. Use the Antigravity template and Claude Code to bypass the 'no SaaS knowledge' barrier and ship production-ready apps.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity template solves the 'no SaaS knowledge' barrier by providing a battle-tested, modular architecture that handles auth, payments, and database schemas out of the box. By pairing this with Claude Code, you automate boilerplate generation, allowing you to focus purely on high-value business logic and client-specific features.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank screen, a client deadline looming, and the crushing realization that building a scalable SaaS from scratch is a labyrinth of authentication, Stripe integration, and database migrations you haven't mastered yet. The industry moves too fast for you to get bogged down in the 'how' of infrastructure while your competitors are already shipping.

But what if you didn't have to build the plumbing? The Antigravity template is the skeleton every senior engineer keeps in their back pocket—a pre-configured, high-performance foundation designed to neutralize the complexity of SaaS architecture. Paired with Claude Code, you’re not just writing code; you’re orchestrating a production-grade machine that turns hours of manual configuration into seconds of execution.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Standardize your project structure to ensure scalability before writing a single line of business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity SaaS boilerplate with Next.js 15, Drizzle ORM, and Resend for transactional emails.

steps.title: Configure Identity and Access Management
steps.description: Bypass manual authentication setup by leveraging the template's secure, pre-defined auth hooks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the authentication middleware to support role-based access control for 'admin' and 'user' roles using the existing Auth module.

steps.title: Integrate Stripe Billing Logic
steps.description: Connect payment processing by mapping client requirements to the Antigravity Stripe-integrated schemas.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a new subscription plan schema in Drizzle and link it to the stripe-webhook handler in the Antigravity API routes.

steps.title: Automate Database Migrations
steps.description: Use the template's migration engine to sync your local environment with production seamlessly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a migration script for the new 'UserActivity' table and apply it to the local development database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npx drizzle-kit generate && npx drizzle-kit migrate'

steps.title: Ship with Optimized Deployment
steps.description: Run the final production build optimization to ensure your app meets enterprise performance standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current project for bundle size optimizations and configure the Vercel edge-caching headers.

pro_tips: Always use the 'dry-run' flag in Claude Code when performing schema migrations to prevent destructive changes.
Keep your Antigravity 'constants' file synced with your client's branding to ensure global theme consistency in seconds.
Inject custom business logic into the Antigravity 'service-layer' rather than bloating your API routes to keep code testable.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your Auth middleware immediately after initialization to ensure security-first development.
Regularly run 'claude audit' on your project dependencies to catch vulnerabilities before they reach your client's production environment.
content.next_steps: After completing the initial setup, focus on building one unique feature per sprint. Use the Antigravity boilerplate to handle the heavy lifting while you iterate on client feedback.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the boilerplate and start delivering value that justifies your premium rates. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
